totalSleepTime_min.healthKitQuery: Sum of HKCategoryTypeIdentifierSleepAnalysis where value in [asleepUnspecified, asleepCore, asleepDeep, asleepREM]

sleepEfficiency_pct.notes: Not directly provided; calculate from in-bed vs asleep times

sleepOnsetLatency_min.derivation: Time from first inBed to first asleep sample

wakeAfterSleepOnset_min.healthKitQuery: Sum of awake samples between sleep onset and final awakening

stages.n2_pct.notes: Includes both N1 and N2 stages

heartRateVariability.rmssd.notes: HealthKit provides SDNN; RMSSD may require raw data access

heartRateVariability.lf_hf_ratio.notes: Not directly available; requires frequency domain analysis of raw RR intervals

oxygenDesaturationIndex.notes: Requires analysis of SpO2 samples during sleep

sleepStaging.validation: Validated against PSG with ~70-75% agreement for stage classification
limitations: May not detect all brief awakenings

hrv.notes: SDNN provided; RMSSD not directly available

limitations: Requires Series 6+ or SE 2+ or Ultra

convertToWIASleep.description: Transform HealthKit sleep data to WIA-SLEEP format
